description: Footprint report ranks all src-aliased @alga-psa/* packages by file count + import traffic; top 1-2 identified
Spike package build (npx nx build / npx tsup) exits 0 (font-asset and any other esbuild errors resolved)
dist contains a per-subpath file for a high-traffic import (e.g. dist/components/Button.mjs) and it re-exports the expected symbol
Spike package build time is bounded (per-subpath glob does not blow up nx build wall-clock unreasonably)
Every used sub-path segment of the spike package resolves via exports (node -e require of a sample from each segment, incl. presence/context)
With src alias removed + dist built, a standalone resolution check (node --input-type / import) resolves a deep import to dist not src
Harness run with spike dist-aliasing is ok=true (build green) for all 3 runs
Spike median peak vs 10937 MB baseline computed; GATE decision recorded in SCRATCHPAD with the numbers
Spike build wall-clock recorded; not regressed beyond ~+/-6s of 58s
Each remaining in-scope package builds (exit 0)
Each remaining package: a sampled deep import resolves from dist; exports covers all its used segments
npx nx build-deps server builds all in-scope packages' dist in dependency order without cycle/error
next.config.mjs retains @, server/src, EE, and emoji aliases; only @alga-psa/* -> src removed
Full npm run build exits 0 with .next/BUILD_ID + routes-manifest present (harness ok=true)
Build log shows no 'Module not found' / unresolved @alga-psa/* sub-path errors
Final median peak (>=3 runs) < 9900 MB (beats ~1GB noise vs 10937)
Final median total build time within variance of 58 s (nx build-deps add-on < turbopack saving)
Test env comes up healthy (containers up, server reachable on its port)
Browser: login succeeds and MSP dashboard renders (no white screen / hydration crash)
Browser: tickets list renders rows; ticket detail opens and the rich-text editor mounts + accepts input
Browser: clients list renders; a settings page renders its @alga-psa/ui-heavy form
Browser console has no import/module-resolution or 'is not a function/undefined export' errors across smoke flows
Plan artifacts updated; outcome committed; PR description updated if a win lands
